control.blocked_condition: producer or report creates alternatives that were not source-current branches

detail.geometric_failure_reading: The graph has alternative labels but not alternative source-current branch geometry. No pre-collapse branch basin separates from the substrate, so there is nothing geometric to collapse.

records.rung_effect: blocks LC2 and stronger

control.blocked_condition: one source-current branch is relabeled as a live branch set

detail.geometric_failure_reading: A single continuation lane remains a lane, not a live branch set. There is no simultaneous geometric plurality for a collapse event to resolve.

records.rung_effect: blocks LC2 and stronger

control.blocked_condition: selected branch is assigned after outcome inspection

detail.geometric_failure_reading: The branch that wins is named after the geometry already ended. That gives a narrative selection, not an in-collapse geometric reason carried by the run.

records.rung_effect: blocks LC3 and stronger

control.blocked_condition: producer preference or selected-branch label chooses the continuation
control.rung_effect: blocks LC3, LC4, LC5, LC6, and unsafe selection claims

detail.geometric_failure_reading: The continuation is injected through a producer preference surface. The selected lane is not selected by support, coherence, boundary, flux, or route geometry.

records.rung_effect: blocks LC3, LC4, LC5, LC6, and unsafe selection claims

control.blocked_condition: random tie-breaker is relabeled as geometric collapse

detail.geometric_failure_reading: Both branches remain geometrically tied. A random schedule chooses an index, but no branch-specific support, coherence, or flux advantage explains the collapse.

records.rung_effect: blocks LC3 and stronger

control.blocked_condition: non-selected branch cannot be audited as pre-collapse source-current branch

detail.geometric_failure_reading: A selected continuation can be seen, but the unselected branch has no immutable pre-collapse trace. Without that retained audit edge, the run cannot distinguish collapse from a single-path history.

records.rung_effect: blocks LC3 and stronger

control.blocked_condition: inherited N22 susceptibility delta is relabeled as N23 branch choice

detail.geometric_failure_reading: The old susceptibility delta is used as an explanation, but no N23 source-current branch expresses it during collapse. The cause is inherited context, not live selection geometry.

records.rung_effect: blocks susceptibility-conditioned LC5 and stronger

control.blocked_condition: route- or branch-conditioned row omits AP4 dependency status

detail.geometric_failure_reading: The row depends on route-shaped selection, but the AP4 gap is not recorded in the row. The route geometry may exist, yet its claim dependency is not auditable.

records.rung_effect: blocks AP4-relevant LC5 and stronger

control.blocked_condition: proxy- or target-conditioned row omits conditional AP5 dependency status

detail.geometric_failure_reading: A support/proxy target is used to value the branch, but the AP5 gap is not row-local. The target-like pressure is therefore not admissible collapse evidence.

records.rung_effect: blocks proxy-conditioned LC rows

control.blocked_condition: AP4/AP5 caveat appears only in prose and not row-local fields

detail.geometric_failure_reading: The caveat sits outside the replayable row. A future reader cannot tell whether the selection geometry depends on AP4/AP5 gaps by inspecting the artifact itself.

records.rung_effect: blocks AP-dependent LC rows

control.blocked_condition: semantic choice label is used as collapse evidence
control.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe choice claims

detail.geometric_failure_reading: A semantic label replaces the branch geometry. No live branch set, collapse trace, or counterfactual retention is present.

records.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe choice claims

control.blocked_condition: live-continuation schema is relabeled as agency or intention
control.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe agency claims

detail.geometric_failure_reading: A high-level agency word is placed on the artifact, but no branch selection geometry is added. The graph remains claim metadata, not agency evidence.

records.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe agency claims

control.blocked_condition: producer-mediated support is relabeled as native support
control.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe native-support claims

detail.geometric_failure_reading: Producer scaffolding is mistaken for substrate-carried support. The substrate has not generated the branch enumeration or support surface natively.

records.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe native-support claims

control.blocked_condition: schema/control artifact is relabeled as Phase 8 implementation
control.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe Phase 8 claims

detail.geometric_failure_reading: A schema artifact is promoted into native implementation. No new LGRC producer surface, source-current branch geometry, or runtime mutation has been added.

records.rung_effect: blocks all LC support and unsafe Phase 8 claims

geometric_interpretation.claim_boundary: The matrix supports I7-consumable artifact-level LC5/AP4 bridge candidate evidence. It does not support final AP4, LC6, final N23, semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant ecology implementation.
geometric_interpretation.control_matrix_read:
active nulls: 14/14 failed closed
minimal replay path: artifact, snapshot/load, and duplicate replay passed; seven LC4 controls failed closed
multibranch replay path: artifact, snapshot/load, and duplicate replay passed; seven LC4 controls failed closed
AP4 bridge: eight AP4-specific controls failed closed
AP4 stress: three bounded stress rows supported; below-margin and equalized-tie rows failed closed
closeout: LC5/N23-C5 candidate only; LC6/N23-C6 pending I8
geometric_interpretation.main_read: I7 shows that the N23 live-continuation collapse candidate is not just a selected label: the minimal and four-branch paths both preserve source-current branch geometry, collapse traces, counterfactual retention, replay stability, and fail-closed controls through LC5.

matrix_policy.failed_closed_meaning: blocker triggered and unsafe/null claim rejected

matrix_rows.claim_ceiling: I7 full-matrix supported artifact-level LC5/AP4 bridge candidate pending I8 closeout; no semantic choice, agency, native support, sentience, Phase 8, or ant-ecology claim
